about.label: About Between Routes
about.title: A more thoughtful way into China.
about.p1: Between Routes is built for people who want more than a standard itinerary — travelers with a real purpose, whether cultural, professional, or personal.
about.p2: We combine local coordination with a more curated, flexible approach — so each experience feels relevant, useful, and well designed.
about.p3: Whether cultural or business-led, the route starts with your objective. We work with small groups and individuals who value depth over volume.

footer.desc: Tailored China experiences for culture seekers, business travelers, and anyone who wants a more thoughtful way in.
footer.tagline: Tailored China Journeys · Cultural · Business · Bespoke

culturalPage.title: Explore China through culture, not checklists.
culturalPage.subtitle: From tea mountains and traditional medicine to local craft and slower rituals, these journeys are designed for travelers who want a deeper, more thoughtful way into China.
culturalPage.p1: Our cultural journeys go beyond sightseeing. They are built around context, pacing, and meaningful local encounters.
culturalPage.p2: Depending on your interests, a route might include tea culture, traditional Chinese medicine, food traditions, heritage towns, crafts, architecture, or modern cultural scenes in cities like Shanghai and Shenzhen.
culturalPage.p3: Each trip is shaped around what you want to understand, not just what you want to see.
culturalPage.feature1: Tea culture journeys in Hangzhou, Wuyi, or Yunnan
culturalPage.feature2: Traditional Chinese medicine and wellness-led travel
culturalPage.feature3: Craft, heritage, food, and slower local experiences

idea1.title: Tea & Mountain Landscapes
idea1.desc: Slow travel through tea-growing regions, tastings, local stays, and cultural rituals tied to landscape and craft.

idea2.title: Wellness & Chinese Wisdom
idea2.desc: A route shaped around movement, balance, daily rituals, Chinese wellness practices, and restorative pacing.

idea3.title: Heritage & Local Life
idea3.desc: Historic towns, architecture, crafts, and food traditions approached with more intimacy and less rush.

culturalPage.formTitle: Tell us what kind of cultural journey you're looking for.
culturalPage.formSubtitle: Share your interests, cities, and timing, and we'll come back with the right next step.
culturalPage.detailsPlaceholder: Tell us more about your interests

seo.title: Cultural Journeys in China – Tea, Heritage & Local Experiences | Between Routes
seo.description: Explore China through tea culture, traditional medicine, craft, and heritage. Tailor-made cultural journeys in China designed around depth, not checklists.

businessPage.title: China trips designed around business purpose.
businessPage.subtitle: For founders, buyers, teams, investors, and partners looking to understand suppliers, industries, trade fairs, or the market on the ground.
businessPage.sectionTitle: Practical support for business travel in China.
businessPage.p1: We help shape business visits that are clearer, more focused, and easier to execute.
businessPage.p2: This may include factory visits, supplier meetings, sourcing routes, market immersion, city planning, translation support, or combining trade fairs with more targeted site visits.
businessPage.p3: The goal is not just to move through a schedule, but to make the trip more useful and better designed.
businessPage.feature3: Business travel routes shaped around your objective

case1.title: Sourcing & Supplier Trips
case1.desc: Built for brands, buyers, and founders who need efficient routes across factories, clusters, and meetings.

case2.title: Trade Fair Extensions
case2.desc: Go beyond the fair itself with site visits, follow-up meetings, and city-to-city coordination.

case3.title: Market Immersion Visits
case3.desc: For teams who want to understand retail, operations, manufacturing, or design ecosystems in China.

businessPage.formTitle: Tell us what kind of business visit you need.
businessPage.formSubtitle: Share your objective, cities, and timing, and we'll come back with the right next step.
businessPage.detailsPlaceholder: Tell us more about your objective

seo.title: China Business & Industry Visits – Factory Tours, Sourcing Trips | Between Routes
seo.description: Curated China business travel for founders, buyers, and teams. Factory visits, sourcing routes, Canton Fair support, and market immersion trips designed around your objective.

tailorPage.title: China travel built around the way you want to move.
tailorPage.subtitle: Not a fixed tour, not a generic itinerary — but a route designed around your interests, pacing, priorities, and purpose.
tailorPage.p1: Tailor-made travel starts with the traveler. We begin with your interests, timing, cities, comfort level, and the kind of experience you want to have.
tailorPage.p2: Some routes lean into culture, some into food, some into nature or modern cities. Some move slowly; others are tightly structured around meetings or multiple destinations.
tailorPage.p3: The point is not to fit you into a template, but to design a route that actually makes sense for you.
tailorPage.feature2: Travel shaped around your interests and goals
tailorPage.feature3: A more considered route, not a one-size-fits-all package

style1.title: Culture-led Travel
style1.desc: Built around tea, heritage, design, food, local traditions, and slower immersion.

style2.title: City & Modern China Routes
style2.desc: For travelers interested in design, innovation, architecture, and urban culture.

style3.title: Mixed-purpose Journeys
style3.desc: Routes that combine travel, learning, meetings, sourcing, or other specific goals.

tailorPage.formTitle: Tell us how you want to travel through China.
tailorPage.formSubtitle: Share your interests, cities, and timing, and we'll shape the right next step.

seo.title: Tailor-Made China Travel – Custom Itineraries & Private Tours | Between Routes
seo.description: Every China journey built around your interests, pace, and purpose. No fixed packages — thoughtfully designed private China travel for independent travelers and groups.

bespokePage.title: More distinctive ways into China.
bespokePage.subtitle: For travelers or teams looking for something more private, more considered, and less standard than what most itineraries can offer.
bespokePage.sectionTitle: Curated around rarity, access, and intention.
bespokePage.p1: Bespoke experiences are for requests that go beyond a standard travel or business route.
bespokePage.p2: That might mean more private cultural encounters, more carefully staged moments, or journeys shaped around a very specific objective, theme, or audience.
bespokePage.p3: The focus is on relevance, quality, and thoughtfulness — not scale.
bespokePage.feature2: Curated moments designed around a specific brief
bespokePage.feature3: Travel and project concepts that need more flexibility and discretion

direction1.title: Private Cultural Access
direction1.desc: Experiences designed around smaller, quieter, more exclusive forms of cultural engagement.

direction2.title: Special-interest Journeys
direction2.desc: Routes built around a theme, a passion, a niche subject, or a specific kind of audience.

direction3.title: High-touch Travel Design
direction3.desc: For journeys where sequencing, discretion, quality, and experience design matter more than volume.
